reasoning: The vfx_echo_summon_v03 sprite itself — a circular green mandala/wreath with a soft pink center orb and white-teal geometric accents — is genuinely on-tone: cute round shape, saturated warm greens and pinks, whimsical magical-circle feel, floral fairy-tale quality. However, the sprite is rendered with a visible opaque dark square background frame rather than a transparent overlay, which creates a harsh non-magical hard-edged look and would look jarring in any brighter fairy-tale scene. The underlying scene environment (deep crimson/maroon dungeon walls, dark stone tiles) already reads closer to dungeon-crawler than sunny toy-diorama, and the opaque box amplifies that mismatch. Sprite graphic design: pass; transparency/compositing: fail; net verdict: marginal.
